mnemonics: Dogs Chase Elephants Rapidly Down Hills
Dead Locks Cause Everyone Rages Doing Homework
keyPoints: A deadlock occurs when two or more processes are blocked indefinitely waiting for each other to release a resource.
Deadlocks can be detected using the Banker's algorithm or the Wait-for graph.
Recovery from deadlock involves aborting one or more processes until a solution is found, or using a deadlock resolution algorithm such as the Death Valley algorithm.
